implementation.description: Current-state assessment across AWS/Azure/GCP, security posture evaluation, cost optimization analysis, landing zone readiness
Standardized landing zone deployment, IAM and network security guardrails, monitoring and alerting setup, compliance policy-as-code
24/7 operations handover, incident response integration, SLA establishment, first-month stabilization with dedicated transition manager

proof_of_value.scope: Well-Architected Review for one hyperscaler environment, 2-week delivery

small.scope: Single hyperscaler, up to 100 instances, 8-week onboarding

medium.scope: Two hyperscalers, up to 300 instances, 12-week onboarding

large.scope: All three hyperscalers, unlimited instances, 16-week onboarding with dedicated CSM
